title: Master GoHighLevel's New Contact Detail Page — Boost Agency Productivity
description: Master GoHighLevel's redesigned Contact Detail Page. Learn the three-panel layout, auto-save features, and keyboard navigation that boost agency productivity.
html_content:
Managing customer data across multiple touchpoints drains agency productivity. Your team spends hours clicking through scattered panels, waiting for pages to load, and hunting for critical contact information when they should be focusing on strategy and growth.

GoHighLevel's redesigned Contact Detail Page eliminates these friction points with a faster, cleaner, and smarter interface that organizes every customer interaction in one place. If you're running a digital marketing agency, this update is a game-changer—and in this guide, I'll show you exactly how to master it.

Ready to experience the difference? Start your FREE 30-day GoHighLevel trial (double the standard trial) and see how this feature transforms your agency's workflow.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Changed: The New Contact Detail Page Explained
  • How the Three-Panel Layout Streamlines Your Workflow
  • Game-Changing Productivity Features You Need to Know
  • Step-by-Step: How to Enable the Contact Detail Page in Your Account
  • Why This Update Matters for Agency Productivity

What Changed: The New Contact Detail Page Explained

The Contact Detail Page is where your team lives in GoHighLevel. It's the hub for viewing customer information, managing communications, tracking activity, and taking action on leads. The old version worked, but it was clunky—slow load times, cluttered layouts, and inefficient navigation meant your team was burning time just trying to find what they needed.

GoHighLevel listened and completely reimagined this page. The new Contact Detail Page delivers:

  • Lightning-fast performance — pages load instantly, even with large contact histories
  • Modern, intuitive design — information is organized logically so your team finds it immediately
  • Auto-Save functionality — changes save automatically; no more lost work or manual saves
  • Responsive layout — adapts beautifully to different screen sizes and devices
  • Keyboard navigation — power users can move through the page without touching the mouse

This isn't just a cosmetic upgrade. It's a productivity redesign built on agency feedback. Every change was made to reduce friction and help your team work faster.

How the Three-Panel Layout Streamlines Your Workflow

The new Contact Detail Page uses a three-panel architecture that mirrors how modern SaaS applications work. Understanding this layout is key to unlocking the page's full potential.

Left Panel: Quick Access & Navigation

The left panel contains core contact details and navigation options. Your team gets a snapshot of the contact's essential information—name, phone, email, tags, and custom fields—without scrolling. From here, they can quickly navigate to different sections of the contact record (activity, tasks, communication history, etc.). It's lean, clean, and focused on getting to what matters fast.

Center Panel: The Main Stage

The center panel is where the action happens. This is where your team views activity feeds, manages communication threads, edits contact details, and logs interactions. It's the largest panel and demands the most attention because it's the primary workspace. The center panel is responsive and collapses intelligently on smaller screens.

Right Panel: Contextual Tools & Information

The right panel holds collapsible sections for tasks, notes, integrations, and additional metadata. Because these panels collapse, your team can hide information they don't need and focus on what's relevant. When they need a specific tool or data point, one click expands it. This reduces cognitive load and keeps the interface clean.

Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 Days

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

Game-Changing Productivity Features You Need to Know

Beyond the layout, the Contact Detail Page introduces several features specifically designed to save your team time and reduce errors.

Auto-Save: No More Lost Data

Every change your team makes—updating contact fields, adding notes, logging calls—saves automatically in real time. This eliminates the friction of manual saves and the anxiety of losing work. Your team can work confidently knowing their data is always persisted.

Collapsible Panels: Reduce Clutter

Not every team member needs to see every panel at all times. Your account managers might want tasks and notes front-and-center, while your sales rep might focus on communication and activity. Collapsible panels let each user customize their view. Hide what you don't need; expand what matters. It's a small feature with a huge impact on focus and speed.

Keyboard Navigation: For Power Users

Keyboard shortcuts and navigation let experienced team members navigate the page without leaving the keyboard. Tab through fields, use arrow keys to move between contacts, and trigger actions with keyboard commands. For high-volume operations, this cuts seconds off each contact interaction—which adds up to significant time savings.

💡 Pro Tip

Train your team on keyboard shortcuts during onboarding. Even a 5-second time savings per contact interaction compounds into hours of productivity gains each month. Create a quick reference sheet and post it in your team workspace.

Step-by-Step: How to Enable the Contact Detail Page in Your Account

The new Contact Detail Page is currently available as a Labs feature, which means you need to explicitly enable it. Here's how:

Step 1: Log into Your GoHighLevel Account

Navigate to your GoHighLevel dashboard with admin or owner credentials.

Step 2: Access Settings

Click on your profile or account icon and select Settings.

Step 3: Find the Labs Section

Look for the Labs or Beta Features section within Settings. GoHighLevel regularly tests new features here before rolling them out platform-wide.

Step 4: Enable Contact Detail Page

Find "New Contact Detail Page" in the Labs menu and toggle it ON. You may see a confirmation message or option to enable it for your entire account or just your user.

Step 5: Start Using It

Navigate to any contact and you'll see the new interface. Take time to explore the layout, collapsible panels, and auto-save functionality. Familiarize yourself before rolling it out to your team.

Step 6: Onboard Your Team

Once you're comfortable, enable it for your team members. Run a quick training session or create a video walkthrough highlighting the key productivity features and how to customize the panel layout.

Why This Update Matters for Agency Productivity

Agency work is all about managing multiple clients, campaigns, and touchpoints simultaneously. Every second saved on administrative work is a second your team can spend on strategy, client communication, or growing the business. The Contact Detail Page redesign directly impacts your agency's bottom line in several ways.

Faster Contact Access = Higher Volume

When your team can navigate to and understand contact data in seconds instead of minutes, they handle more leads and clients without working longer hours. This directly increases capacity and revenue potential.

Fewer Errors from Better Organization

When information is organized logically and auto-saves, your team makes fewer mistakes. Missed follow-ups, duplicated efforts, and data entry errors drop significantly. Better data quality means better decision-making.

Reduced Training Time for New Hires

A cleaner, more intuitive interface means new team members get up to speed faster. What used to take two weeks to learn can now take days. That's real cost savings and faster ROI on hiring.

Better Team Morale

When tools work smoothly and don't create friction, team morale improves. Your team spends less time fighting software and more time doing meaningful work. That's a win for culture and retention.
